title: DSV India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DSV India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
